response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance as 'Harmonia' based on on-screen text at 00:00. 2. Performer mentions 'Oboro' in the talk segment (02:22). 3. Lyrics were partially transcribed from the on-screen text as no official lyrics were found through search. 4. Created scene objects for the performance and the talk segment.
response.global_summary: A performance by Shiranui Flare featuring a song titled 'Harmonia'. The performer also mentions 'Oboro' during the talk segment. The performance includes dancing and visual effects in a concert setting.

scenes.description: Shiranui Flare performs the song 'Harmonia'. The stage features colorful visual effects and on-screen text related to the song lyrics. The lyrics '始まりと終わりのように', '変幻自在に', '飛び立つ', '不安だった', '重なり合った', '本当はずっと', '物語が始まる時さ', '世界が溶け合う' appear on the screen during the performance.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
始まりと終わりのように
変幻自在に
飛び立つ
不安だった
重なり合った
本当はずっと
物語が始まる時さ
世界が溶け合う
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Like the beginning and the end, ever-changing, I take flight. It was anxious, it overlapped, truly it was always, when the story begins, the world melts together.

scenes.description: Shiranui Flare talks about the songs 'Oboro' and 'Harmonia', mentioning that the song 'Oboro' was performed with her friend Iris. She then introduces a new segment involving a character named 'Waku'.
